prospect.name: Marcus Obi
prospect.title: Head of Engineering
prospect.research_notes: DevCo (Series A, 80 engineers) has 6 open 'Senior SRE' job postings on their careers page as of March 2026. Marcus joined 8 months ago. Company blog has two posts this quarter about managing on-call fatigue and incident response time.
recent_triggers: DevCo has 6 open Senior SRE job postings on their careers page (March 2026)
Company published blog post 'Reducing Mean Time to Recover' on March 14, 2026
Second blog post on on-call fatigue published Feb 2026

sender.name: Priya Nair
sender.value_prop: Cut P1 incident response time by 50% and reduce on-call burden without adding headcount
sender.social_proof_stat: Lattice reduced their mean time to recover by 54% in the first 60 days

email.body:
Six open Senior SRE postings tells me reliability is a live pain point at DevCo right now — not a future one.

Sentinel Ops cuts P1 incident response time by 50% and takes load off the on-call rotation without growing the team. Lattice dropped their MTTR by 54% in 60 days.

Are you free for 15 minutes this week?
email.personalization_hook: 6 open Senior SRE job postings on DevCo careers page, March 2026 — corroborated by two company blog posts about on-call fatigue and MTTR.
email.cta: Are you free for 15 minutes this week?

variants.body:
Your 'Reducing Mean Time to Recover' post last week, plus 6 open SRE roles — reliability is clearly front of mind.

Sentinel Ops halves P1 response time and reduces on-call load without adding headcount. Lattice cut their MTTR by 54% in 60 days.

Worth 15 minutes to see if it fits?

Two blog posts about on-call fatigue this quarter and 6 SRE roles open — DevCo is scaling faster than the reliability tooling can keep up.

Sentinel Ops reduces P1 incident response time by 50% and cuts on-call burden without growing headcount. Lattice saw 54% MTTR improvement in 60 days.

Are you free Thursday for a quick chat?
